---
title: "Rapport mensuel pour l'analyse de l'Indice des Prix à la Consommation(IPC)"
author: "Direction Régionale de Tanger-Tétouan-Al Hoceima"
format: 
  html:
    self-contained: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    toc-location: left
    toc-title: Sommaire
    grid :
      sidebar-width: 250px
      body-width: 1000px
      margin-width: 50px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
    css: style_html.css  
params: 
    p_ville: "" 
    p_periode: ""
           
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| label: initialisation
#| echo: false 
#| warning: false 
#| message: false 
 
# Packages 
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(kableExtra) 
library(ggplot2) 
library(tidyr)
library(glue)
library(stringr)
library(janitor)

# option 
# pour empêcher quarto d'appliquer automatiquement son propre style, alignement, pagination, etc.)
options(knitr.table.html.attr = "quarto-disable-processing=true") 
```

```{r}
#| label: parametres
#| echo: false
#| warning: false 
#| message: false 
# Recuperation des parametres
code_ville <- str_pad(params$p_ville, width = 2, pad = "0")
periode_analyse <- params$p_periode 
```

```{r}
#| label: preparation_donnees
#| echo: false 
#| warning: false 
#| message: false 

# sous-prog_traitement_donnees
source(file="ZZ_Preparation_donnees_analyse.R")
```

```{r}
#| label: titre
#| echo: false 
#| warning: false 
#| message: false
 
if (code_ville != "99") {
      titre <- glue("Ville de {l_ville} en {l_mois}  {substr(periode_analyse,1,4)} ")
} else {
     titre <- glue("{l_ville} en {l_mois}  {substr(periode_analyse,1,4)} ")
}
```

# [`r titre`]{style="color:red;"}

# Ensemble

```{r}
#| label: ensemble
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

kable(ipc_ensemble,
      col.names = c("Secteur",
                    "Evolution mensuelle",
                    "Evolution annuelle"),
      format.args = list(decimal.mark = ","),
      escape = F,
      caption ="<span style='font-size:20px'>Evolutions mensuelles et annuelles<br>par grand secteur</span>") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = "striped",
                full_width = FALSE,
                position = "left",
                font_size = 14) %>%
  column_spec(1, width = "6cm") %>%
  row_spec(1, bold = T)
```

# Secteur alimentaire

```{r}
#| label: alimentaire
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false


ipc_alim %>% 
  select (code,libelle_diff,evol_mens,evol_an) %>%
  kable(col.names = c("Code",
                    "Produits",
                    "Evolution mensuelle",
                    "Evolution annuelle" ) ,
       format.args = list(decimal.mark = ","),
       escape = F ,
      caption ="<span style='font-size:20px'>Evolutions mensuelles et annuelles<br>pour les produits alimentaires</span>") %>% 
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = "striped",  
                full_width = F, 
                position = "left", 
                font_size = 14) %>% 
    row_spec(1, bold = T) %>% 
    column_spec(2, width = "12cm") 
 
# Mensuel 
ipc_alim_mens <- ipc_alim %>% 
  select (code, libelle_diff, evol_mens) %>%  
  arrange(desc(evol_mens))  
 
ipc_alim_mens %>%  
  kable(col.names = c("Code",
                      "Produits", 
                      "Evolution mensuelle" ),
        format.args = list(decimal.mark = ","), 
        escape = F, 
        caption ="<span style='font-size:20px'>Les évolutions mensuelles décroissantes des produits alimentaires</span>") %>% 
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = "striped",
                full_width = F, 
                position = "left", 
                font_size = 14)  %>% 
  row_spec(which(ipc_alim_mens$code == "001ALIM"), bold = T) %>% 
  column_spec(2, width = "12cm") 
 
# Annuel 
ipc_alim_an <- ipc_alim %>% 
  select (code,libelle_diff,  evol_an) %>%  
  arrange(desc(evol_an))  

ipc_alim_an %>% 
  kable(col.names = c("Code",
                      "Produits", 
                      "Evolution annuelle" ), 
        format.args = list(decimal.mark = ","), 
        escape = F, 
        caption ="<span style='font-size:20px'>Les évolutions annuelles décroissantes des produits alimentaires</span>") %>%  
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = "striped",  
                full_width = F,  
                position = "left", 
                font_size = 14)  %>% 
  row_spec(which(ipc_alim_an$code == "001ALIM"), bold = T) %>%  
  column_spec(2, width = "14cm")
```

# Secteur non alimentaire

```{r}
#| label: non_alimentaire
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

ipc_nonalim %>%
  select (code,libelle_diff,evol_mens,evol_an) %>%
    kable(col.names = c("Code",
                        "Produits",
                        "Evolution mensuelle",
                        "Evolution annuelle" ),
        format.args = list(decimal.mark = ","),
        escape = F,
        caption ="<span style='font-size:20px'>Evolutions mensuelles et annuelles<br>pour les produits non alimentaires</span>") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = "striped",
                full_width = F,
                position = "left",
                font_size = 14) %>%
  row_spec(1, bold = T) %>%
  column_spec(2, width = "12cm")

# Mensuel

ipc_nonalim_mens <- ipc_nonalim %>%
  select (code,libelle_diff,  evol_mens) %>%
  arrange(desc(evol_mens))

ipc_nonalim_mens %>%
  kable(col.names = c("Code",
                      "Produits", 
                      "Evolution mensuelle" ),
       format.args = list(decimal.mark = ","),
       escape = F,
       caption ="<span style='font-size:20px'>Les évolutions mensuelles décroissantes des produits non alimentaires</span>") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = "striped",
               full_width = F,
               position = "left",
               font_size = 14)  %>%
  row_spec(which(ipc_nonalim_mens$code == "001NONALIM"), bold = T) %>%
  column_spec(2, width = "12cm")
 
# Annuel
 
ipc_nonalim_an <- ipc_nonalim %>%
    select (code,libelle_diff,  evol_an) %>%
    arrange(desc(evol_an))

ipc_nonalim_an %>%
 kable(col.names = c("Code",
                     "Produits", 
                     "Evolution annuelle" ),
       format.args = list(decimal.mark = ","),
       escape = F,
       caption ="<span style='font-size:20px'>Les évolutions annuelles décroissantes des produits non alimentaires</span>") %>%
 kable_styling(bootstrap_options = "striped",
               full_width = F,
               position = "left",
               font_size = 14)  %>%
  row_spec(which(ipc_nonalim_an$code == "001NONALIM"), bold = T) %>%
  column_spec(2, width = "14cm")

```

# Evolution dans le temps de l'IPC

## Evolution annuelle

```{r}
#| label: graphique_annuel
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| classes: .my_class_gra 
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 5

ggplot2::ggplot(data=ipc_evol_annuel_gra, 
                aes(x=x_date, 
                    y=evol,
                    group=1 )) +
  geom_line(color = "red",linewidth = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, col="black", linewidth=1) +
  geom_point(size=1.5)  +
  xlab("Période") +
  ylab("Evolution (%)") +
  ggtitle("Graphique de l'évolution annuelle en %")  +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size= 16) , 
       axis.title = element_text(size= 13) ,
       axis.text.x = element_text(size= 10),
       axis.text.y = element_text(size= 10) )

```

```{r}
#| label: tab_graphique_annuel
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

opts <- options(knitr.kable.NA = "")

ipc_evol_annuel %>%
  select(x_date,ipc,evol) %>%
  kable(col.names = c("Date",
                      "IPC", 
                      "Evolution annuelle" ),
        format.args = list(decimal.mark = ","),
        escape = F,
        caption ="<span style='font-size:20px'>Tableau de l'évolution annuelle en %</span>") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = "striped",
                full_width = FALSE,
                position = "left",
                font_size = 14)  %>%
  column_spec(c(1,2,3), width = "3cm") %>%
  column_spec(2,color = "gray")

```

## Evolution mensuelle

```{r}
#| label: graphique_mensuel
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| classes: .my_class_gra
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 5

ggplot2::ggplot(data=ipc_evol_mensuel_gra,
                aes(x=x_date,
                    y=evol,
                    group=1 )) +
  geom_line(color = "red",linewidth = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, col="black", linewidth=1) +
  geom_point(size=1.5)  +
  xlab("Période") +
  ylab("Evolution (%)") +
  ggtitle("Graphique de l'évolution mensuelle en %")  +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size= 16),
        axis.title = element_text(size= 13),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size= 8),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size= 10))

```

```{r}
#| label: tab_graphique_mensuel
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

opts <- options(knitr.kable.NA = "")

ipc_evol_mensuel %>%
  select(x_date,ipc,evol) %>%
  kable(col.names = c("Date","IPC", "Evolution mensuelle" ),
        format.args = list(decimal.mark = ","),
        escape = F,
        caption ="<span style='font-size:20px'>Tableau de l'évolution mensuelle en %</span>") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = "striped",
                full_width = FALSE,
                position = "left",
                font_size = 14)  %>%
  column_spec(c(1,2,3), width = "3cm") %>%
  column_spec(2,color = "gray")

```

# Tableau de synthèse

```{r}
#| label: tableau_synthese
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
  
if (code_ville != "99") {
      titre_tabsyn <- glue("<span style='font-size:20px'>Indice des prix à la consommation de la ville de  {l_ville} : {l_mois} {substr(periode_analyse,1,4)} (base 2017 :100)</span>")
} else {
      titre_tabsyn <- glue("<span style='font-size:20px'>Indice des prix à la consommation au niveau national : {l_mois} {substr(periode_analyse,1,4)} (base 2017 :100)</span>")
}

ipc_tableau %>% 
  kable(col.names = linebreak( c("",
                                 "",
                                 paste0(l_mois12," ",a_mois12 ),
                                 paste0(l_mois3," ",a_mois3 ),
                                 paste0(l_mois2," ",a_mois2 ),
                                 paste0(l_mois1," ",a_mois1 ),
                                 paste0(l_mois," ",substr(periode_analyse,1,4) ),
                                 "mois",
                                 "3 mois", 
                                 "12 mois" ) ,
                               align = "l") ,
         format.args = list(decimal.mark = ","),
         align = c("lrrrrrrrrr"),
         escape = F,
         caption = titre_tabsyn ) %>% 
     kable_styling(full_width = F,
                 position = "left",
                 font_size = 14 ) %>% 
      add_header_above(c("Division de produits" = 1,
                         "Pondérations" = 1,
                         "Indice mensuel" = 5,
                         "Variation (%)" = 3),
                       bold = TRUE) %>%
   row_spec(c(1,4,15),bold=T,background = "#BBBBBB")  %>%
   column_spec(1, width_min = "6cm") %>%
   column_spec(c(8,9,10), width = "1.9cm")

```

<!-- # TEST -->

<!-- ```{r} -->

<!-- #| label: test -->

<!-- print(code_ville) -->

<!-- print(periode_analyse) -->

<!-- print(liste_var_gra_men) -->

<!-- print(ipc_evol_mensuel_gra) -->

<!-- ``` -->
